% =============================================================================
% Appendix F --- Simulation Waveforms
% Five placeholder figure slots, each to be populated from a ModelSim
% capture generated by the corresponding wave wrapper testbench.
% =============================================================================

\chapter{Simulation Waveforms}
\label{app:waveforms}

This appendix collects ModelSim waveform captures that illustrate the
sequences described in \Cref{ch:rtl,ch:verification,ch:results}. Each
image is produced by running the corresponding wave wrapper testbench
with the companion \sv{.do} file under \sv{verif/Controller/do/waves/}
or \sv{verif/Input\_Buffer/do/waves/}, then exporting the waveform
window to PDF (preferred) or PNG.

\section{Program--Verify without Injection}
\label{app:wave-ok}

\begin{figure}[htbp]
    \centering
    \includegraphics[width=0.95\linewidth]{fig_app_wave_prog_verify_ok}
    \caption[PROG--VERIFY without injection]{ModelSim waveform of a
        clean program--verify cycle in
        \sv{controller\_prog\_verify\_lut\_10w\_tb\_waves\_tb}. Key
        signals from top to bottom: \signame{host\_cmd},
        \signame{valid}, \signame{state}, \signame{prog\_state},
        \signame{verify\_state}, \signame{pulses}, \signame{pulse\_cnt},
        \signame{pulse\_done}, \signame{ann\_core\_word},
        \signame{weight\_read\_data}, \signame{busy}. Expected
        sequence: \stateval{S\_IDLE}\,\(\rightarrow\)\,\stateval{S\_PROGRAM}
        (through \sv{PROG\_HIZ}\,\(\rightarrow\)\,\sv{PROG\_SELECT}\,\(\rightarrow\)\,\sv{PROG\_WRITE}\,\(\rightarrow\)\,\sv{PROG\_WAIT\_ACK}\,\(\rightarrow\)\,\sv{PROG\_COMPLETE})\,\(\rightarrow\)\,\stateval{S\_VERIFY}\,\(\rightarrow\)\,\stateval{S\_IDLE}
        with \signame{pulses} pulsing \sv{PULSE\_MODE\_PROG} (010)
        and \sv{PULSE\_MODE\_READ} (001).}
    \label{fig:app-wave-prog-verify-ok}
\end{figure}

\clearpage

\section{Under-Programmed Injection}
\label{app:wave-under}

\begin{figure}[htbp]
    \centering
    \includegraphics[width=0.95\linewidth]{fig_app_wave_under_injection}
    \caption[PROG--VERIFY under-programmed injection]{ModelSim
        waveform at an injected under-programmed index (one of the 14
        indices in \Cref{tab:inject-indices}, upper row). Expected:
        first \sv{PROG\_WRITE} completes, \stateval{S\_VERIFY} enters
        \sv{VERIFY\_CHECK} with
        \signame{weight\_read\_data}~\(<\)~\signame{expected\_weight},
        \signame{prog\_retry\_cnt} increments, the main FSM returns to
        \stateval{S\_PROGRAM} through \sv{VERIFY\_IDLE}, and the short
        retry pulse train fires on \signame{pulses}. The cycle repeats
        until the shadow matrix catches up and \sv{VERIFY\_CHECK} takes
        the match branch to \sv{VERIFY\_DONE}.}
    \label{fig:app-wave-under-injection}
\end{figure}

\clearpage

\section{Over-Programmed Injection}
\label{app:wave-over}

\begin{figure}[htbp]
    \centering
    \includegraphics[width=0.95\linewidth]{fig_app_wave_over_injection}
    \caption[PROG--VERIFY over-programmed injection]{ModelSim
        waveform at an injected over-programmed index (lower row of
        \Cref{tab:inject-indices}). Expected:
        \sv{VERIFY\_CHECK} observes
        \signame{weight\_read\_data}~\(>\)~\signame{expected\_weight},
        the main FSM transitions to \stateval{S\_ERASE} with
        \signame{verify\_failure\_starts\_erase}~=~1 and
        \signame{erase\_from\_host}~=~0, runs through the full erase
        sub-FSM with \signame{pulses}~=~\sv{PULSE\_MODE\_ERASE} during
        \sv{ERASE\_PULSE}, and then re-enters \stateval{S\_PROGRAM}
        because \signame{retry\_cnt}~\(<\)~3 after
        \sv{ERASE\_COMPLETE}.}
    \label{fig:app-wave-over-injection}
\end{figure}

\clearpage

\section{Inference Path (Collect, Compute, Result)}
\label{app:wave-inf}

\begin{figure}[htbp]
    \centering
    \includegraphics[width=0.95\linewidth]{fig_app_wave_inf_compute}
    \caption[Inference waveform]{ModelSim waveform from
        \sv{controller\_inf\_buffer\_flow\_tb\_waves\_tb} during a
        nine-beat \sv{CMD\_INF} burst. Expected:
        \stateval{S\_COLLECT\_DATA} with
        \signame{buf\_reg\_ctrl}~=~\sv{CTRL\_DATA\_LOAD} and eight
        successive writes to \sv{buffer\_reg[0..7]};
        \stateval{S\_COMPUTE} with \signame{pulses}~=~\sv{PULSE\_MODE\_INF};
        \signame{bit\_count} stepping 0..7 and the lanes
        \signame{D0}\ldots\signame{D7} presenting the selected bit of
        each of the eight pixels in parallel; transition to
        \stateval{S\_RESULT} on \signame{pulse\_done}, then one cycle
        in \stateval{S\_RESULT} and return to \stateval{S\_IDLE}.}
    \label{fig:app-wave-inf-compute}
\end{figure}

\clearpage

\section{Integration Run (Mixed Commands)}
\label{app:wave-integration}

\begin{figure}[htbp]
    \centering
    \includegraphics[width=0.95\linewidth]{fig_app_wave_integration}
    \caption[Integration waveform]{ModelSim waveform from
        \sv{parallel\_interface\_controller\_integration\_tb\_waves\_tb}
        showing several of the ten labelled transactions back-to-back.
        Expected: \signame{valid} rises for one cycle per transaction,
        the DUT enters its per-command state and returns to
        \stateval{S\_IDLE} before the next \signame{valid}; the input
        buffer's \sv{buffer\_reg[0:63]} accumulates payload bytes on
        PROG / INF cases but is not disturbed by READ / ERASE cases;
        \signame{pulses} takes the correct \sv{PULSE\_MODE\_*} per
        command class throughout.}
    \label{fig:app-wave-integration}
\end{figure}
